entries.Name: H&K G12A3z
entries.Accessories: Integral laser sight, Gas-Vent 2 recoil reduction, telescoping stock
entries.Notes: Can mount under-barrel grenade launcher at minimal concealability loss.

entries.Name: AFR-7 Flash Grenade
entries.Notes: Blast zone 1m (5L damage). Flash effective to 30m, target modifier +6 reduced by 1 per 5m. Flare Comp halves modifier. Lasts 5 combat turns.

entries.Name: TAPS Sharpshooter Autosoft R1
entries.Notes: Adds Rating to drone Pilot for Gunnery Tests. Cannot be used while rigger directly controls drone.

entries.Name: IPA ClearSight Autosoft R1
entries.Notes: Adds Rating to drone Pilot for Perception Tests. Can combine with rigger Intelligence (Rating cannot exceed Intelligence). Not usable for combat tests.

entries.Name: TAPS Sharpshooter Autosoft R2
entries.Notes: Adds Rating to drone Pilot for Gunnery Tests. Cannot be used while rigger directly controls drone.

entries.Name: IPA ClearSight Autosoft R2
entries.Notes: Adds Rating to drone Pilot for Perception Tests. Can combine with rigger Intelligence (Rating cannot exceed Intelligence). Not usable for combat tests.

entries.Name: TAPS Sharpshooter Autosoft R3
entries.Notes: Adds Rating to drone Pilot for Gunnery Tests. Cannot be used while rigger directly controls drone.

entries.Name: IPA ClearSight Autosoft R3
entries.Notes: Adds Rating to drone Pilot for Perception Tests. Can combine with rigger Intelligence (Rating cannot exceed Intelligence). Not usable for combat tests.

entries.Name: TAPS Sharpshooter Autosoft R4
entries.Notes: Adds Rating to drone Pilot for Gunnery Tests. Cannot be used while rigger directly controls drone.

entries.Name: IPA ClearSight Autosoft R4
entries.Notes: Adds Rating to drone Pilot for Perception Tests. Can combine with rigger Intelligence (Rating cannot exceed Intelligence). Not usable for combat tests.

entries.Name: TAPS Sharpshooter Autosoft R5
entries.Notes: Adds Rating to drone Pilot for Gunnery Tests. Cannot be used while rigger directly controls drone.

entries.Name: IPA ClearSight Autosoft R5
entries.Notes: Adds Rating to drone Pilot for Perception Tests. Can combine with rigger Intelligence (Rating cannot exceed Intelligence). Not usable for combat tests.

entries.Name: Ruhrmetall Vogeljager MRAAM
entries.Notes: Multi-role anti-air missile. 4 variants (weights vary). Intel 5. +4 TN and 8D vs ground targets. Range 50m-10km.

entries.Name: Saab-Saaker AIM-11R
entries.Notes: Air-to-air missile, aircraft-mount only. Intel 6. +4 TN and 8D vs ground targets. Range 150m-15km. Sales tightly controlled.

entries.Name: Mitsubishi-GM Outlaw VMS Block I (ICM)
entries.Notes: ICM warhead: 14D to all targets within 10m radius. Vehicles reduce damage 1 level. Intel 5. Range 50m-10km.

entries.Name: Mitsubishi-GM Outlaw VMS Block IA (DP-ICM)
entries.Notes: DP-ICM: same as Block I but negates vehicle damage reduction. Intel 5. Range 50m-10km.

entries.Name: Mitsubishi-GM Outlaw VMS Block II
entries.Notes: Anti-armor, top-attack. Vehicle armor half effective, no damage reduction. Intel 6. Range 50m-10km.

entries.Name: Textron 'Trapdoor' Smart Mine
entries.Notes: Rating 4 sensor, Rating 2 Pilot. 500m scan range. Anti-vehicle AP submunition. Can deploy via RASCAM rocket.

entries.Name: Textron RASCAM (w/8 Trapdoor Mines)
entries.Notes: Rocket-artillery self-contained anti-armor mine system. Deploys 8 Trapdoor mines in 50m octagonal pattern.

entries.Name: Loral-Vought 'Zapper' Static Discharge Rockets
entries.Notes: Anti-drone weapon. Electrical discharge burns out drone circuitry. ASIST backlash damages controlling rigger (Willpower test, Power = 7+VCR rating).

entries.Name: Loral-Vought 'Jabberwocky' Jammer Rocket
entries.Notes: Disperses jamming transponders. Level 4 ECM/radio/remote jamming in area (50 + 3D6 Ã— successes meters). Pre-set to jam sensors, radio, or remote control.

entries.Name: Loral-Vought 'Jabberwocky' Jammer Missile
entries.Notes: Missile version of Jabberwocky. Intel 3. Level 4 ECM/radio/remote jamming in area.

entries.Name: Loral-Vought 'Silencer' AARM
entries.Notes: Advanced anti-radiation munition (AARM). Homes on sensor emissions and anti-sensor ECM. Anti-vehicle AP.
